title: Tender Ukrainian Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring San Marzano tomatoes and a tagine cooking style, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This paleo-friendly dish is made with tender beef and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium high heat and add the beef stew meat, cooking until browned on all sides.
Remove the browned beef from the pot and set aside, then add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the crushed San Marzano tomatoes, beef broth, and tagine spice blend to the pot, stirring to combine.
Return the browned beef to the pot and bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1.5 hours.
Add the chopped carrots and celery to the pot and continue to simmer for an additional 30 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
Garnish with fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
